summary: Current HEAD 5ade483c1848edf56c1f0e11782cb616cc3281b2 preserves the previously reviewed architecture and specification. The only delta from reviewed HEAD 6ed774dc77d187c42b894e2f073a50580c72e631 is a Story-local delivery-efficiency budget amendment in .vibepro/config.json; runtime code, design lineage, formal contract, content binding, and tests are unchanged. Current exact-HEAD focused verification passes 39/39 and the acceptance E2E matrix passes 8/8.
inspection_summary: Independently inspected the architecture review request, current-HEAD delta, Story/Architecture/Spec lineage, design SSOT reconciliation, runtime freshness and content-binding implementation, focused contract tests, compatibility/E2E coverage, and exact-HEAD verification evidence. The budget-only metadata change authorizes five bounded existing-reviewer lifecycles and does not alter review policy, inspected surfaces, release impact, lifecycle guarantees, or source behavior. No architecture-boundary regression or uncovered changed path was found.

Runtime source, formal specification, review plan policy, content bindings, and tests are byte-identical to the previously reviewed architecture. The reason bounds the amendment to five existing-reviewer lifecycles and disallows replacement agents or further amendments.
